headline: Is Valero Well Positioned to Return Capital to Its Shareholders?
summary: VLO invests in refining upgrades and clean fuels to boost margins, cash flow and long-term shareholder returns.

headline: Valero Tests Key Line After Cracking Buy Point Following Refiner's Swing To Profit
summary: Valero stock is in focus after touching past an all-time high this week. The oil refiner is seeing big demand for its refined products.
